title: Condition (SNOMED Essential hypertension, encounter-diagnosis, active/confirmed) -> one condition_occurrence row
notes: Derived from real Synthea FHIR Condition fhir.condition.id=aa5b13cf-0be3-a9ae-ee92-41c65a963a72 and its verified pipeline output cdm_ours_fhir.condition_occurrence (surrogate condition_occurrence_id = stringToId(Condition.id || '|' || std_concept_id)). Single Condition.code.coding: SNOMED http://snomed.info/sct 59621000 'Essential hypertension (disorder)'. Stage-1 view Condition__condition_occurrence fans out one staging row per code.coding; here there is exactly one coding so one row. Stage-2 _resolve_condition.sql walks the coding through cm.fhir_system_to_omop_vocab (snomed.info/sct -> SNOMED) then vocab.concept (source) -> 'Maps to' -> vocab.concept (standard, standard_concept='S'). SNOMED 59621000 is ITSELF a standard Condition concept (concept_id 320128, concept_name 'Essential hypertension', domain_id 'Condition', standard_concept 'S'), so it Maps-to itself: condition_concept_id = condition_source_concept_id = 320128. std_domain='Condition' so the row routes to condition_occurrence (not observation/procedure/measurement) and survives the WHERE r.std_domain='Condition' filter. verificationStatus='confirmed' is not in ('refuted','entered-in-error') so the row is NOT excluded. condition_type_concept_id comes from category.first().coding.first().code 'encounter-diagnosis' via cm.fhir_condition_category_to_omop -> 32827 ('EHR encounter record', Type Concept). condition_status_concept_id: stage-2 prefers verificationStatus over clinicalStatus; 'confirmed' via cm.fhir_verification_status_to_omop -> 32893 ('Confirmed diagnosis', Condition Status). clinicalStatus 'active' maps to 0 in cm.fhir_clinical_status_to_omop (only 'resolved' has a non-zero target), so it is not used; instead 'active' is copied verbatim into condition_status_source_value. Dates: condition_start_date/datetime = COALESCE(onset.ofType(dateTime), onset.ofType(Period).start, recordedDate); here onsetDateTime=1998-01-01T21:26:17+00:00 -> 1998-01-01 / 1998-01-01 21:26:17. No abatement[x] so condition_end_date/datetime are NULL and stop_reason (left(abatement_string,20)) is NULL. No asserter and no recorder so provider_id is NULL. condition_source_value = left(COALESCE(code_display, src_code, code_text),50) = code.coding.display 'Essential hypertension (disorder)' (33 chars, no truncation). condition_source_concept_id = src_concept_id = 320128 (the SNOMED source concept, which equals the standard concept here). person_id and visit_occurrence_id are FK hashes (referenceToId of subject / encounter) asserted symbolically.
